description:
Comprehensive Hardware Analysis, Monitoring and Reporting for Windows and DOS.


- Fixed Corsair iCUE Link Hub support.
- Improved support of next-generation AMD CPUs and APUs.
- Added main report and sensor logging in JSON format [HWiNFO 64/ARM64 only].
- Added main report and sensor logging in YAML format [HWiNFO 64/ARM64 only].
- Added command-line option to add a note in report files.
- Added monitoring of GC-HPWR (BTF connector) pin currents on ASUS BTF mainboards.
- Added KSC 1.5 and 2.0 monitoring on Kontron systems.
- Improved support of soft-downcored AMD systems.
- Added limited support of Lisuan LX 7G100.
